parents.subject: LU-18231 obd: change obd_force into OBDF_FORCE

commit.subject: LU-18231 obd: change obd_fail into OBDF_FAIL
commit.message:
LU-18231 obd: change obd_fail into OBDF_FAIL

Change the use of the obd_fail bitfield into a bit in
the obd_flags bitmap and use atomic bit set/clear/test
operations on it.
No logical changes to the code and no changes to locking.
